articles.title: Rajasthan: Tika Ram Jully attacks Centre over fuel price hike, accuses Modi of 'double standards'
articles.description: Rajasthan's Leader of Opposition Tika Ram Jully criticises the Centre's fourth petrol and diesel price hike in two weeks, accusing PM Modi of double standards on fuel prices.

articles.title: 'Foolish, immature, and anarchic': BJP vs Rahul Gandhi over fuel price hike in India
articles.description: On Monday, India witnessed the fourth hike in petrol and diesel prices amid the uncertainty in the global market. While petrol rates were increased by Rs 2.61 per litre, diesel prices rose by Rs 2.71 a litre.

articles.title: Maruti Suzuki Swift vs Hyundai Grand i10 Nios - Which Hatchback Is For You?
articles.description: Maruti Suzuki Swift and Hyundai Grand i10 Nios dominate India's hatchback segment, with ex-showroom prices starting at Rs 5.79 lakh and Rs 5.55 lakh respectively. While both models feature 1.2-litre petrol engines and offer CNG options, their performance differs slightly., Car News, Times Now

articles.title: Harish Rao demands slash 10% VAT on petrol and diesel
articles.description: Harish Rao urges Telangana CM Revanth Reddy to cut VAT on petrol and diesel by 10%, citing Hyderabad fuel prices and ₹2,000 crore extra VAT revenue.

articles.title: West Asia crisis hits India’s fuel economics: Government loses Rs 14,000 cr after fuel duty cuts
articles.description: On March 27, the Centre reduced excise duty by Rs 10 per litre on both petrol and diesel after crude oil prices surged amid tensions in West Asia.

articles.title: FOREX-Dollar drifts lower as oil falls on Hormuz deal optimism
articles.description: The dollar dropped against major currencies on Monday as hopes of a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz pushed oil prices below $100 per barrel, even as the U.S. and Iran played down the chances of reaching an agreement soon.

articles.title: Centre dials states to monitor fuel supplies at OMC pumps, check hoarding, mismanagement
articles.description: Centre reviewed petrol and diesel supply with states after panic buying in some regions. Government said fuel stocks remain adequate nationwide.

articles.title: Why India Petrol and Diesel Prices Are Rising Despite Lower Global Crude Rates
articles.description: India fuel price hike: Why petrol and diesel rates keep rising despite a dip in global crude oil benchmarks.
